mapper.select: SELECT ro.receive_order_id, ro.receive_order_number, ro.total_amount, ro.make_invoice_flag, ro.check_status, ro.check_remark, ro.invoice_status, ro.tax_point, ro.remark, ro.verification_flag, ro.check_attachment, ro.create_user_name, ro.enterprise_id, s.shipper_id, s.consignor as shipperName, s.short_name, ro.account_period_date, ro.bill_attachment, ro.create_time, ro.business_date, ro.attachment, roi.invoice_name FROM t_receive_order ro LEFT JOIN t_receive_order_invoice roi ON roi.receive_order_id = ro.receive_order_id LEFT JOIN t_shipper s ON s.shipper_id = ro.shipper_id LEFT JOIN t_shipper_principal sp on s.shipper_id = sp.shipper_id and sp.type = #{queryForm.shipperSaleType} LEFT JOIN t_receive_order_waybill trow on trow.receive_order_id = ro.receive_order_id LEFT JOIN t_waybill tw on tw.waybill_id = trow.waybill_id

SELECT ro.receive_order_id, ro.receive_order_number, ro.total_amount, ro.make_invoice_flag, ro.invoice_status, ro.tax_point, ro.remark, ro.invoice_status, ro.check_status, ro.check_attachment, ro.bill_attachment, ro.create_user_name, s.consignor as shipperName, s.short_name, ro.create_time, ro.business_date, ro.attachment FROM t_receive_order ro LEFT JOIN t_shipper s ON s.shipper_id = ro.shipper_id where ro.receive_order_id =#{receiveOrderId}

select ro.* from t_receive_order ro left join t_receive_order_waybill trow on trow.receive_order_id = ro.receive_order_id where trow.waybill_id = #{waybillId} and ro.check_status != #{excludeCheckStatus}

select ro.receive_order_id, ro.receive_order_number, trow.waybill_id, ro.attachment, ro.check_user_id, ro.check_user_name from t_receive_order ro left join t_receive_order_waybill trow on trow.receive_order_id = ro.receive_order_id where ro.check_status != #{excludeCheckStatus} and trow.waybill_id in
#{item}

select IFNULL(SUM(a.total_amount),0) from ( SELECT ro.receive_order_id,ro.total_amount FROM t_receive_order ro LEFT JOIN t_receive_order_invoice roi ON roi.receive_order_id = ro.receive_order_id LEFT JOIN t_shipper s ON s.shipper_id = ro.shipper_id LEFT JOIN t_shipper_principal sp on s.shipper_id = sp.shipper_id and sp.type = #{queryForm.shipperSaleType} LEFT JOIN t_oa_enterprise oe ON oe.enterprise_id = ro.enterprise_id LEFT JOIN t_receive_order_waybill trow on trow.receive_order_id = ro.receive_order_id LEFT JOIN t_waybill tw on tw.waybill_id = trow.waybill_id
) as a

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(rov.verification_amount),0) from ( SELECT ro.receive_order_id FROM t_receive_order ro LEFT JOIN t_receive_order_invoice roi ON roi.receive_order_id = ro.receive_order_id LEFT JOIN t_shipper s ON s.shipper_id = ro.shipper_id LEFT JOIN t_shipper_principal sp on s.shipper_id = sp.shipper_id and sp.type = #{queryForm.shipperSaleType} LEFT JOIN t_oa_enterprise oe ON oe.enterprise_id = ro.enterprise_id LEFT JOIN t_receive_order_waybill trow on trow.receive_order_id = ro.receive_order_id LEFT JOIN t_waybill tw on tw.waybill_id = trow.waybill_id
)as a LEFT JOIN t_receive_order_verification rov ON a.receive_order_id = rov.receive_order_id

SELECT receive_order_id, shipper_id, total_amount FROM t_receive_order
verification_flag = #{queryForm.verificationFlag}
AND DATE_FORMAT(account_period_date, '%Y-%m-%d') < DATE_FORMAT(#{queryForm.accountPeriodDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{queryForm.startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{queryForm.endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND shipper_id IN
#{item}
select receive_order_id from t_receive_order where receive_order_number = #{receiveOrderNumber}
